title: Smith Works - 3d
description: Detailed 3d tools models and textures made by me Pingoh (screenshots were provided by hludge)
body:
![Smith Works - 3d](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80845d5af1d72f5b5cc9660547a9fa6f73263f94_0.webp)
This is a pack focused on 3d tools models the textures and models where fully made by me Pingoh the screnshots are provided by Hludge, The pack will be updated with all the new tools (copper)
and when the spear fully releases it will have a 3d model too

(vfx+ and hold my items are used for the screenshots)
